appraisal_events.evidence: Décrit comme vraie brute en cela; projet ancien de séduire puis abandonner; calculs cyniques (exploiter sa future femme, la prostituer); revirements d’adoration puis de haine envers Bloch et M. Nissim Bernard, antisémitisme, menaces de procès, sortir avec un revolver.
appraisal_events.explanation: The portrait accumulates traits of baseness, opportunism, and nervous and moral instability in Morel, clearly lowering his local estimation.

status_effects.explanation: He undergoes a strong diminution through the exposure of his social brutality, his self-interested designs, and his aggressive and anti-Semitic reversals.
